title: Executive decision options deck
description: Create a leadership deck that supports a concrete operating decision.

question.query: Create an 8-10 slide executive decision deck for a leadership team deciding whether to invest in customer support automation. Use these working facts: 40,000 tickets per month, current cost per ticket is $7.20, CSAT is 83%, backlog age is 9 days, available budget is $1.2M, and the target is to reduce cost per ticket by 30% while improving CSAT by 5 points. The deck must frame the decision, compare three options, include a tradeoff matrix, recommend one option, explain risks and mitigations, show an implementation plan, and end with a clear decision ask. Include at least one chart and one summary table.
